message:
Expand load-time benchmark to warm-start mode and harden E2E CLI test harness

- ext_load_time_benchmark.rs: Major expansion (598 lines) adding warm-start
  measurement mode alongside cold-start. Each extension is now benchmarked
  in two phases: cold (fresh QuickJS runtime + context creation) and warm
  (reused runtime after one warmup load). Statistics computed per-extension,
  per-tier, and per-group (official-simple / official-complex / community).
  Default iterations bumped from 5 to 100 for statistical significance.
  New env vars: PI_LOAD_BENCH_WARMUP, PI_LOAD_BENCH_SCOPE, PI_LOAD_BENCH_MAX.
  Budget default lowered from 200ms to 100ms reflecting optimization gains.
- e2e_cli.rs: Add DEFAULT_CLI_TIMEOUT_SECS constant (120s) and
  CliTestHarness::cli_timeout() that respects PI_E2E_CLI_TIMEOUT_SECS env
  var, replacing hardcoded durations. Add Read import for stdin pipe usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
